description: An IT auditor tests for toxic access combinations within a financial application.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all user roles and their associated permissions within the ERP system.

expected_outcome.expected: Auditor has the complete role-permission matrix.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all users and their assigned roles.
Analyze the data to find users who are assigned roles that allow them to both create a vendor and approve an invoice, a known toxic combination.

expected_outcome.expected: The analysis identifies three users with this conflicting access.
